common.keepJourney: Keep the journey. Not the noise.

settings.title: Language
settings.description: Choose the JourneyOS interface language. Your preference stays on this device.

today.prompt: What do you want to remember today?
today.prototypeLine: From desert heat to mountain night.
today.addImage: Add one image when the day gives you a scene worth keeping.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Only the moments worth keeping stay here. Days without memory can remain quiet.

timeSpace.aria: JourneyOS time and space swipe interface
timeSpace.memorySubtitle: All memories become a book that belongs to you.
timeSpace.nowSubtitle: You are writing the journey as it happens.
timeSpace.nowQuestion: What do you want to keep from this moment?
timeSpace.journeySubtitle: Every step ahead is part of the story.
timeSpace.inspirationCopy: When the future is still empty, JourneyOS can quietly offer a direction.

timeFlow.captureHelp: Leave one line, or add a photo. Time, place, and content stay inside this Moment.
timeFlow.capturePlaceholder: What do you want to keep from this moment?
timeFlow.localOnly: Saved in JourneyOS local space in this browser on this device. Nothing is uploaded, and your original photo library is not changed.
timeFlow.localStorageLine: Photos and words are saved in this browser's IndexedDB on this device. Nothing is uploaded; clearing site data removes the JourneyOS local copy.
timeFlow.photoUnavailable: This local photo copy cannot be read right now. Check whether browser site data was cleared.
timeFlow.noSaved: Nothing has been kept in this moment yet.
timeFlow.importPlanHelp: Future plans can be imported from Excel, CSV, or text. They become soft drafts for future Moments.
timeFlow.variableSpaceLine: Import, switching, language, and future plans live here. The current Moment only needs to be lived and kept.
timeFlow.futureBoundaryLine: This is not memory yet. It is a future plan that can change, be deleted, or be imported again.
timeFlow.defaultAhead: The next scene is getting closer.

journeys.title: Possibilities
journeys.futureSpaceDescription: Only unfinished, changeable futures live here. What has happened returns to Memory and does not stay in Future Space.
journeys.error: Could not read this file. Try CSV, TXT, JSON, or a simple Excel itinerary.
journeys.emptyFutureTitle: No future has been brought in yet
journeys.emptyFutureDescription: It can stay empty. Bring in a destination, file, screenshot, or idea when it appears.
journeys.futureImportDescription: Bring Excel, PDF, screenshots, emails, or plain text into JourneyOS. The system first shapes it into a future journey draft. Nothing joins the timeline until you confirm.
journeys.pastePlaceholder: Example: 7/8 Flagstaff Hotel, 7/9 Grand Canyon sunset, 7/10 Walnut Canyon...
journeys.aiLayerNotice: AI only organizes temporarily. Results become drafts first and join JourneyOS only after confirmation.
journeys.intelligenceDescription: JourneyOS calls capabilities, not a model directly. DeepSeek currently returns drafts only; confirmation is required before anything joins Moment or Future.
journeys.intelligenceDraftOnly: Output is always an AI Draft and never overwrites lived records automatically.
journeys.confirmRule: AI only organizes the future. It never changes your journey until you confirm.
journeys.missingStay: {count} days do not have stay details yet. You can add them later.

day.memoryPlaceholder: What do you want to remember today?
day.memoryEmpty: What do you want to remember today?
day.photosEmpty: Add one image when the day gives you a scene worth keeping.
day.storyHelp: When the memory feels ready, turn it into one quiet share page. Private details stay hidden.
day.title: Title
day.addOnlyNeeded: Add only the moments this day needs.
day.name: Name

share.title: Story
share.description: Let a few memories become one quiet story. Not a generator, just a calm preview.
share.seedDefault: Today has one scene worth keeping.
share.reviewed: I reviewed what this story shares
share.subtitle: Subtitle
share.titlePlaceholder: From Desert Heat to Mountain Night
share.previewHint: Choose one memory, then preview the story.

travelBook.title: Journey Book
travelBook.privateBookDesc: Keeps the full journey for yourself.
travelBook.shareSafeDesc: Removes hotels, flights, exact GPS, expenses, contacts, and private notes.
travelBook.openingLine: The journey is still happening. Memory will slowly become a book.

shareStory.subtitle: {temp} across {route}.
shareStory.defaultSeed: Today unfolded along {route}, with {temp} setting the rhythm.
shareStory.bodyMiddle: The day moved in clean scenes: morning logistics, changing light, small stops that made the map feel human, and an evening arrival with a different kind of quiet.
shareStory.bodyPrivacy: Only the shareable parts are here: city-level route, weather, selected photos, and the feeling of the day. The private itinerary stays local.
shareStory.closing: Created from a private local itinerary, shared only with selected moments.
shareStory.firstScene: The first scene of the day.
shareStory.roadScene: Road time, changing light, and a wider horizon.
shareStory.stopScene: A stop worth slowing down for.
shareStory.smallScene: A small marker in the day's rhythm.

travelBookExport.footer: Keep the journey. Not the noise.
